title: SX1262.cs: send RX_EXIT on SetStandby
description: Send RX_EXIT to sim when firmware leaves RX mode via SetStandby (0x80) or SetTx (0x83). Do not send RX_EXIT after receiving RX_PACKET/RX_TIMEOUT since sim already transitioned node out of RX_WAIT. Track rxMode state and only send if currently in RX mode.
acceptance_criteria: SetStandby/SetTx while in RX mode sends RX_EXIT; sim node state transitions to IDLE
close_reason: Implemented: SendRxExit on SetStandby/SetTx; EC2 validation pending
